highlights.text: [cron:c625abe6-9676-458f-8d05-d5e98e940459 neoncortex-am-brief] Prepare a concise Morning Brief for JL based on the current business tracker and active priorities across Tuque, Zebra, Clutch, Auradine, Pivot. Then send from neoncortex2000@gmail.com to jl.zoeckler@gmail.com as HTML (Notion-style clean card layout): soft gray background, centered white container, clear section headers, bullet lists, and compact KPI/status table. Include sections in this exact order: (1) Top 3 Priorities, (2) Per-Business Status (RAG + next action), (3) Blockers Needing JL Decision Today, (4) Today's First 5 Actions. Subject format: NeonCortex AM Brief - YYYY-MM-DD. Keep it short, scannable, and executive-ready. Current time: Sunday, March 15th, 2026 — 10:04 PM (America/Los_Angeles) / 2026-03-16 05:04 UTC

I couldn’t build the AM brief because there’s no business tracker or project data anywhere in the workspace (only the initial bootstrap files are present). Without the current Tuque/Zebra/Clutch/Auradine/Pivot status notes or KPIs, I’d just be guessing. Let me know where that tracker lives (Notion link, spreadsheet path, etc.) and I’ll pull the data, generate the brief, and send the formatted Gmail right away.
